caption: A soccer player in a blue training kit and neon green cleats kicks a soccer ball across a green grass field in a stadium with red seating. In the background, advertising boards display text such as "Granada Premium," "Concesionario Oficial," "COVIRAN," and "PULEVA." An overlay featuring the Real Madrid crest and a red button labeled "SUBSCRIRE" appears on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the player kicks the ball toward a goal where a goalkeeper in a blue jersey and black shorts stands ready. A coach or staff member wearing a black "Fly Emirates" tracksuit and a face mask stands behind the goalkeeper. The goalkeeper catches the ball mid-air and then holds it while standing in front of a white advertising banner that reads "Ruta Veleta." The "SUBSCRIRE" overlay remains visible throughout the scene.
